reviews.review_description: It was a long game for $5 I beat it in an hour
This game is really good however it is way too scary for me. 👁👄👁

I PURCHASED THIS FOR MY GEARVR AND NOW WE ARE HAVING TO REPURCHASE THIS APP FOR THE QUEST 2 I WILL NEVER REPURCHASE IT WE SHOULD GET A FREE UPGRADE !!! AS YOUR STEALING FROM CUSTOMERS WE CAN LONGER PLAY WHAT WE PAID FOR I HOPE THEY FAIL AS A BUSINESS
i have this on my samsung gear vr but you need to pay again for play on quest 2 for the same game.
Scariest title I own. Still cant finish it.

Its a fun game to play and I really enjoyed playing it.  Now for my biggest issue and why im only giving 2 stars is due to the fact that since I upgraded to a quest 2, I am not able to redownload dreadhalls and I have to purchase it again.  Im sorry but its very annoying that I have already purchased this game for one VR headset and cant use it on an upgraded version of that headset.
I'm sick tired of developers trying to make us buy their games every single time for every headset. I'm done with this.
This will give you nightmares. Worth the money.

I am SO bummed right now, I'm a sucker for a good horror anything and this game is awesome! Except - the controller randomly stops moving forward, quite often. I really hope there is a fix for this, I want to play this game.
No motion sickness whatsover and enjoyed it thoroughly, still gotta actually finish it though, haha.
I love letting everyone who comes over try this game and snapchating it or posting on instagram because the reactions are so hilarious! Definitely get it.

So it feels like this has all been said but this game is very good i dont know if its just because im old but i am to detatched and dont have enough imagination to get scared with any media its kind of a bummer but this game has spooked me i read of ppl "throwing off their headsets from fear" i cannot go that far but even once the spookyness fades its still a legit game with great core mechanics and its hard as balls my goodness lol but in a good way because the randomness it took me a good 10ish tries atleast to get the 2nd of 4 eyeballs but it has some RNG cause of the randomness but it never feels cheap nice work

This is a very tense and atmospheric game. 
Moving through those endless claustrophobic corridors and then out into large chambers filled with stone pillars and shadows makes for a delicious sense of unease.
For some reason the music and scenery puts me in mind of the Hellraiser films.
It's a game i go back to quite often.
It's actually one of the better games on the GO. and I have been playing it for about a week now. Plenty of levels and plenty of scares.  Plenty of eyeballs to find.  Good game.
You're gonna be scared.  I don't care who you are.
Was bored after only 2 minutes. So many games like it but go for the ones that are visually more appealing. This is very drab looking making it boring.

reviews.review_title: Best game i played on VR
reviews.review_description:
I guess the other players are playing with their elbows.
Controls are so easy every one of my friends got into the game I'm less than 2 minutes. We stream it to Facebook and have a good laugh.

I played this game on the rift... Bought a daydream bought the game... Bought a GO bought the game again! At least 6of my friends played it and every one loved it. It's our game night game.

Graphics are good
Controls are amongst the best I've seen (click forward to move, backward for inventory, trigger to select and back to pause - how hard is it) the game have a story mode and a random map mode. Both are crazy good! 

Really scary and just make sure you keep an eye on the one playing. I always stay next to them. Some people try run in real life. It can break your VR if there's a wall near.

reviews.review_title: Looks promising but literally can't walk
reviews.review_description: The graphics and the general concept of the game look great but it won't let me walk forward very often. I've not been able to play for more than 5 mins without it breaking. I've just purchased a game pad to see if that helps but the unplayability is just unacceptable. Only buy if you have a gamepad (I'm using the oculus go btw)
